source: Basic Conditions of Employment Act 75 of 1997 - Sections 37, 38, 39, 40, 41

tiers.description: More than 6 months but less than 1 year

severance_pay.trigger: Dismissal based on operational requirements (retrenchment) under Section 189 or 189A of LRA

rate_per_completed_year.description: 1 week's remuneration for each completed year of continuous service

calculation.remuneration_basis: Employee's current weekly remuneration at date of dismissal
calculation.completed_years: Only completed years count; partial years are not included
calculation.example: Employee with 5 years 8 months service = 5 weeks severance pay

does_not_apply_to: Dismissal for operational requirements where employee unreasonably refused alternative employment

must_include: Description of main work categories or trade
